title: stelis asplundii
intro: Stelis asplundii, also known as the Asplund's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is an orchid species that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis asplundii include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
